SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made on the 1st day of October 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No. S7654321B), of 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, email: weiming.tan@example.sg, phone: +65 9123 4567;

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S8765432C), of 456 Clementi Avenue 3, #03-45, Singapore 678901, email: siti.aishah@example.sg, phone: +65 9876 5432;

3. Dr. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC No. S9876543D), of 789 Serangoon North Avenue 1, #01-01, Singapore 345678, email: dr.ramasamy@example.sg, phone: +65 6789 0123;

AND

MegaCorp Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456A), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 10 Anson Road, #25-00, International Plaza, Singapore 079903.

WHEREAS, the parties have agreed to enter into this Agreement to regulate the affairs and conduct of the Company and the rights and obligations as shareholders.

AND WHEREAS, the parties have agreed on an initial capital contribution of SGD 500,000. 

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
